title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
